title: Guardian of the Monad Peaks
description: A colossal winged guardian rests among violet peaks, lifting a Monad Verse sign above a turquoise valley.

title: Heroes Through the Rift
description: A cast of clawed, horned companions bursts from a blazing portal into deep space.

title: Companions in the Pack
description: Looking back over one shoulder: a striped beanie, a grinning pug, a blue-eyed kitten, and a sky full of sparks.

title: Portrait of a Pirate Duck
description: A bearded duck pirate and his parrot, framed twice over — a painting of a painting.

title: Angel at the Frozen Gate
description: Wings spread on the ice, a haloed figure watches a diamond of light rise over the frozen sea.

title: The Neon Offering
description: An open hand presents a glowing Monad seal while violet energy bends around the gift.

title: Hello, Emerald World
description: A green familiar greets a sunny pixel meadow — HELLO WORLD written across the sky.

title: The Gathering at the Purple Altar
description: Hooded seals assemble as one of their own rises in a column of purple light.

title: Pastel Pepe Valentine
description: A soft purple Pepe floats among hearts, glitter, and two patient pastel rabbits.

title: Pink Underglow
description: A cool companion leans on a classic lowrider — flame sleeves, chrome chain, neon on wet asphalt.

title: A Feast Among Friends
description: The hero wall. Hot pot, skewers, and three companions at the table — the museum borrows their warm light.
